_meta.description: All tunable gameplay balance values for Wings Over No Man's Land. Extract from index.html r2. Edit this file, not the HTML. Nico: load this at startup via fetch('config/balance.json') and merge values into CAMPAIGNS stages and global constants before game initialises. If the fetch fails, fall back to the hardcoded defaults already present in the HTML.

global._note: Top-level game constants. Correspond to JS const declarations near line 1599 of index.html.

xpPerAceStep.description: Number of enemy kills required to earn 1 XP point.

baseFireInterval.description: Milliseconds between player shots in normal fire mode.

rapidFireInterval.description: Milliseconds between player shots when Rapid Fire is active.

doubleBurstXpCost.description: XP cost to activate Double Burst mode.

doubleBurstDuration.description: Duration of Double Burst mode in milliseconds.

rapidFireXpCost.description: XP cost to activate Rapid Fire mode.

rapidFireDuration.description: Duration of Rapid Fire mode in milliseconds.

planeWidth.description: Player plane hitbox width in canvas pixels.

planeHeight.description: Player plane hitbox height in canvas pixels.

planeX.description: Horizontal position of player plane from left edge of canvas.

groundHeight.description: Height of the ground zone at the bottom of the canvas.

damage._note: Damage state flight penalties. Applied multiplicatively on top of base flight profile. Source: getDamageFlightState() around line 2274.

level1.description: One hit taken — slight handling degradation.

level2plus.description: Two or more hits taken — significant handling degradation.

hitRecoveryJumpPenalty.description: Additional jump multiplier penalty during the hitRecovery stun window.

hitRecoverySpeedPenalty.description: Additional speed multiplier penalty during the hitRecovery stun window.

planes._note: Per-aircraft flight profile overrides. These values are applied on top of DEFAULT_PLANE_FLIGHT_PROFILE (see default object below). Nico: merge each plane entry over the default at load time. Fields: gravityMultiplier, jumpMultiplier, speedMultiplier, maxFallSpeed, hitboxFactor, enemyHitboxFactor, durabilityBias.

e3std._note: Fokker E.III — early-war monoplane. Slightly sluggish.

albatrosdvstd._note: Albatros D.V — mid-weight, slightly better climb than E.III.

dr1std._note: Fokker Dr.I — superb climb and jump, small hitbox.

d7std._note: Fokker D.VII — fast, stable, high fall speed.

d7rb._note: D.VII Red Baron livery — identical stats to d7std.

d7vik._note: D.VII Viktor livery — identical stats to d7std.

dh1._note: Airco DH.1 — early British pusher, slow.

dh2._note: Airco DH.2 — nimble, low gravity, small hitbox.

triplanestd._note: Sopwith Triplane — near-identical to Dr.I in feel.

camelstd._note: Sopwith Camel — fast and punchy, aggressive bias.

dh9._note: Airco DH.9 — bomber profile, large hitbox, sluggish jump.

plane_size._note: Fuselage lengths in meters. Drives computed pixel widths via formula: gameplayWidth = round(meters * 11.7), thumbWidth = round(meters * 9.2), hangarWidth = round(meters * 15.5). Source: PLANE_SIZE_DATA + getPlaneSizeMetrics().

stages._note: Per-stage tuning values for Belgium campaign. Key format: {campaign_id}_{stage_id}. Nico: on load, locate each stage in CAMPAIGNS by matching campaign.id + stage.id and merge these values into the stage object.

belgium_flak_screen._note: First flak introduction. Enemies start spawning faster.

belgium_observation_line._note: Balloon-only stage. No air enemies. Tests targeting under pressure.

belgium_contested_line._note: Combined threat: enemies + flak. Faster ramp than flak_screen.

belgium_ace_pursuit._note: Final endless stage. Enemies are one tier higher than player, 3 HP. High-value scoring zone.

score_gates._note: Score thresholds that control stage transitions within Belgium campaign. These mirror the scoreStart/scoreEnd fields in each stage object. Listed separately here so Dante can see the full progression arc without hunting through stage objects.

ace_pursuit._note: null = Infinity, campaign runs until death
